ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
$Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User - API Only", $Profile.Name <> "Integration User", $Profile.Name <> "SW Billing", $Profile.Name <> "SW Billing Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended", $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps", RecordType.DeveloperName <> "Wolves",
IsClosed = TRUE, PRIORVALUE(IsClosed) = TRUE,
OR( ISCHANGED(ForecastCategoryName), ISCHANGED(Assigned_CSM_Name__c), ISCHANGED(Account_AM__c), ISCHANGED(Similarweb_Forecasting_status__c), ISCHANGED(Amount), ISCHANGED(CloseDate), ISCHANGED(Cycle_Price__c), ISCHANGED(Cycle__c), ISCHANGED(Cycle_Price_Local__c), ISCHANGED(Max_ARR__c), ISCHANGED(Type), ISCHANGED(RecordTypeId) ),
!UpdatedByNextStageFlow__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opportunity cannot be modified once closed
